label.v: Chi tiết cập nhật qui trình

header.v: Chi tiết cập nhật qui trình

command.text:
declare @$invoiceExists nvarchar(512), @$replacementExists nvarchar(512), @$invoiceUpdateConflict nvarchar(512), @$replacementUpdateConflict nvarchar(512), @$invoiceDeleteConflict nvarchar(512), @$replacementDeleteConflict nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) declare @$paymentConflict nvarchar(512), @$existFlowConflict nvarchar(512), @$flowConflictType nvarchar(512) select @$invoiceExists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Hóa đơn gốc đã có hoặc không hợp lệ.' else N'The original invoice is invalid or already exists.' end select @$replacementExists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Hóa đơn thay thế đã có hoặc không hợp lệ.' else N'The replacement invoice is invalid or already exists.' end select @$invoiceUpdateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Hóa đơn gốc đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the original invoice. It has already been used.' end select @$replacementUpdateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Hóa đơn thay thế đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the replacement invoice. It has already been used.' end select @$invoiceDeleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Hóa đơn gốc đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the original invoice. It has already been used.' end select @$replacementDeleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Hóa đơn thay thế đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the replacement invoice. It has already been used.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Hóa đơn thay thế đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The replacement invoice has been modified or deleted by another user.' end
select @$paymentConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã có chứng từ thanh toán cho hóa đơn gốc, không thể thay thế được.' else N'The original invoice has been paid.' end select @$existFlowConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Hóa đơn thay thế đã có qui trình, không cập nhật qui trình được.' else N'The replacement invoice has already retrieved data from a previous process.' end select @$flowConflictType = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Giao dịch của hóa đơn thay thế khác với hóa đơn gốc, không cập nhật qui trình được.' else N'The replacement invoice has transaction code does not match with the one in the original invoice.' end

if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0) begin select 'so_ct0' as field, @$invoiceExists as message return end if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec1 = @stt_rec1) begin select 'so_ct1' as field, @$replacementExists as message return end
if @ma_ct = 'HDA' and exists(select 1 from cttt20 where stt_rec_tt = @stt_rec0) begin select 'so_ct0' as field, @$paymentConflict as message return end
if @ma_ct = 'HDA' and @cn_qui_trinh = 1 begin declare @q nvarchar(4000), @checkStatus bit set @q = 'if exists(select top 1 1 from d81$' + convert(char(6), @ngay_ct1, 112) + ' where stt_rec = @stt_rec1 and (stt_rec_dh <> '''' or stt_rec_px <> '''')) set @checkStatus = 1 else set @checkStatus = 0' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@stt_rec1 char(13), @checkStatus bit out', @stt_rec1, @checkStatus out if @checkStatus = 1 begin select 'cn_qui_trinh' as field, @$existFlowConflict as message return end
set @q = 'if (select loai_ct from m81$' + convert(char(6), @ngay_ct0, 112) + ' where stt_rec = @stt_rec0) <> (select loai_ct from m81$' + convert(char(6), @ngay_ct1, 112) + ' where stt_rec = @stt_rec1) set @checkStatus = 1 else set @checkStatus = 0' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@stt_rec0 char(13), @stt_rec1 char(13), @checkStatus bit out', @stt_rec0, @stt_rec1, @checkStatus out if @checkStatus = 1 begin select 'cn_qui_trinh' as field, @$flowConflictType as message return end end
select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID update @hddt01ct set stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0

if not exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec0 = $stt_rec0.OldValue) begin select 'so_ct0' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @u0 tinyint, @u1 tinyint, @id0 varchar(32), @id1 varchar(32) if @stt_rec0 <> $stt_rec0.OldValue or @stt_rec1 <> $stt_rec1.OldValue begin if @stt_rec0 <> $stt_rec0.OldValue and exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0 and stt_rec0 <> $stt_rec0.OldValue) begin select 'so_ct0' as field, @$invoiceExists as message return end if @stt_rec1 <> $stt_rec1.OldValue and exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec1 = @stt_rec1 and stt_rec1 <> $stt_rec1.OldValue) begin select 'so_ct1' as field, @$replacementExists as message return end
select @u0 = 1, @u1 = 1, @id0 = $stt_rec0.OldValue, @id1= $stt_rec1.OldValue select @q = 'if exists(select 1 from hddt00$' + convert(varchar(6), @ngay_ct0, 112) + ' where stt_rec = ''' + replace(@id0, '''', '') + ''' and tinh_trang_hddt = ''4'') select @u0Out = 0' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@u0Out tinyint output', @u0Out = @u0 output if @u0 = 0 begin select 'so_ct0' as field, @$invoiceUpdateConflict as message return end
select @q = 'if exists(select 1 from hddt00$' + convert(varchar(6), @ngay_ct1, 112) + ' where stt_rec = ''' + replace(@id1, '''', '') + ''' and tinh_trang_hddt = ''2'') select @u1Out = 0' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@u1Out tinyint output', @u1Out = @u1 output if @u1 = 0 begin select 'so_ct1' as field, @$replacementUpdateConflict as message return end
-- Check Payment of Original Voucher if @ma_ct in('HD2', 'HD4', 'HD6') begin if exists(select 1 from cttt20 where loai_tt = 1 and left(stt_rec, 10) = left(@stt_rec0, 10)) begin select 'so_ct0' as field, @$paymentConflict as message return end end if @ma_ct in('PXC', 'PXD') begin if exists(select 1 from cttt30 where loai_tt = 1 and left(stt_rec, 10) = left(@stt_rec0, 10)) begin select 'so_ct0' as field, @$paymentConflict as message return end end if exists(select 1 from cttt20 where stt_rec_tt = @stt_rec0) begin select 'so_ct0' as field, @$paymentConflict as message return end
end
if @ma_ct = 'HDA' begin if @stt_rec0 = $stt_rec0.OldValue and @stt_rec1 = $stt_rec1.OldValue begin select @u0 = 1, @u1 = 1, @id0 = $stt_rec0.OldValue, @id1= $stt_rec1.OldValue select @q = 'if exists(select 1 from hddt00$' + convert(varchar(6), @ngay_ct0, 112) + ' where stt_rec = ''' + replace(@id0, '''', '') + ''' and tinh_trang_hddt = ''4'') select @u0Out = 0' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@u0Out tinyint output', @u0Out = @u0 output if @u0 = 0 begin select 'so_ct0' as field, @$invoiceUpdateConflict as message return end end
if @cn_qui_trinh = 1 begin declare @checkStatus bit set @q = 'if exists(select top 1 1 from d81$' + convert(char(6), @ngay_ct1, 112) + ' where stt_rec = @stt_rec1 and (stt_rec_dh <> '''' or stt_rec_px <> '''')) set @checkStatus = 1 else set @checkStatus = 0' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@stt_rec1 char(13), @checkStatus bit out', @stt_rec1, @checkStatus out if @checkStatus = 1 begin select 'cn_qui_trinh' as field, @$existFlowConflict as message return end
set @q = 'if (select loai_ct from m81$' + convert(char(6), @ngay_ct0, 112) + ' where stt_rec = @stt_rec0) <> (select loai_ct from m81$' + convert(char(6), @ngay_ct1, 112) + ' where stt_rec = @stt_rec1) set @checkStatus = 1 else set @checkStatus = 0' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@stt_rec0 char(13), @stt_rec1 char(13), @checkStatus bit out', @stt_rec0, @stt_rec1, @checkStatus out if @checkStatus = 1 begin select 'cn_qui_trinh' as field, @$flowConflictType as message return end end end
if @stt_rec0 <> $stt_rec0.OldValue begin if $hddt01ct.NewValue = $hddt01ct.OldValue update hddt01ct set stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0 where stt_rec0 = $stt_rec0.OldValue end update @hddt01ct set stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0 if $hddt01ct.NewValue <> $hddt01ct.OldValue delete hddt01ct where stt_rec0 = $stt_rec0.OldValue

if $hddt01ct.NewValue <> $hddt01ct.OldValue insert into hddt01ct select * from @hddt01ct update hddt01 set stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0, ma_nt0 = @ma_nt0, ma_kh0 = @ma_kh0, t_tt_nt0 = @t_tt_nt0, stt_rec1 = @stt_rec1, ma_nt1 = @ma_nt1, ma_kh1 = @ma_kh1, t_tt_nt1 = @t_tt_nt1, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec0 = $stt_rec0.OldValue and stt_rec1 = $stt_rec1.OldValue

declare @q nvarchar(4000), @u0 tinyint, @u1 tinyint, @ngay_ct0 smalldatetime, @ngay_ct1 smalldatetime select @u0 = 1, @u1 = 1, @ngay_ct0 = ngay_ct0, @ngay_ct1 = ngay_ct1 from hddt01 where stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0 and stt_rec1 = @stt_rec1
select @q = 'if exists(select 1 from hddt00$' + convert(varchar(6), @ngay_ct0, 112) + ' where stt_rec = ''' + replace(@stt_rec0, '''', '') + ''' and tinh_trang_hddt = ''4'') select @u0Out = 0' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@u0Out tinyint output', @u0Out = @u0 output if @u0 = 0 begin select 'so_ct0' as field, @$invoiceDeleteConflict as message return end
select @q = 'if exists(select 1 from hddt00$' + convert(varchar(6), @ngay_ct1, 112) + ' where stt_rec = ''' + replace(@stt_rec1, '''', '') + ''' and tinh_trang_hddt = ''2'') select @u1Out = 0' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@u1Out tinyint output', @u1Out = @u1 output if @u1 = 0 begin select 'so_ct1' as field, @$replacementDeleteConflict as message return end delete hddt01ct where stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0
